item.title: Surveillance Is Not Safety: A statement on the UK's latest threat to privacy [pdf]
item.description: Surveillance Is Not Safety: A statement on the UK's latest threat to privacy [pdf]
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Massachusetts House passes Data Privacy Act
item.description: Another victory for privacy. The Massachusetts State House voted 146-0 in favor of passing the Data Privacy Act. Safeguards include restrictions on selling Geolocation, medical information, and more protections for minors.
item.content:encoded: Another victory for privacy. The Massachusetts State House voted 146-0 in favor of passing the Data Privacy Act. Safeguards include restrictions on selling Geolocation, medical information, and more protections for minors.
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: We Are Being Warned That A "Godzilla El Niño" Could Absolutely Devastate Global Food Production
item.description:
We Are Being Warned That A "Godzilla El Niño" Could Absolutely Devastate Global Food Production

We are being told that there is more than an 80 percent chance that El Niño conditions will arrive by the end of next month due to rapidly warming equatorial waters in the Pacific. Meanwhile, an unprecedented "9,000-mile marine heatwave" has developed in
item.content:encoded:
We Are Being Warned That A "Godzilla El Niño" Could Absolutely Devastate Global Food Production

We are being told that there is more than an 80 percent chance that El Niño conditions will arrive by the end of next month due to rapidly warming equatorial waters in the Pacific. Meanwhile, an unprecedented "9,000-mile marine heatwave" has developed in
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: 6.4 Magnitude Quake Rocks Western Cuba, Sends Tremors Into South Florida
item.description:
6.4 Magnitude Quake Rocks Western Cuba, Sends Tremors Into South Florida

The USGS reported that a magnitude 6.4 earthquake struck just off the coast of Cuba around 2 p.m. ET, with residents across parts of Florida reporting feeling the shaking.

Notable quake, preliminary info: M 6.4 - 118 km WNW of Mantua, Cuba

The offshore quake was detected near Pinar del Río, located in western Cuba. In
item.content:encoded:
6.4 Magnitude Quake Rocks Western Cuba, Sends Tremors Into South Florida

The USGS reported that a magnitude 6.4 earthquake struck just off the coast of Cuba around 2 p.m. ET, with residents across parts of Florida reporting feeling the shaking.

Notable quake, preliminary info: M 6.4 - 118 km WNW of Mantua, Cuba

The offshore quake was detected near Pinar del Río, located in western Cuba. In
item.dc:creator: Jordan Ames

item.title: India Rescues 24 Crewmembers From Stricken Tanker Off Oman After US Airstrike
item.description:
India Rescues 24 Crewmembers From Stricken Tanker Off Oman After US Airstrike

Update(1315ET): US Navy forces have announced a new Monday direction action operation in the Gulf of Oman. The US has cited that the vessel refused to respond to orders related to the blockade of Iranian naval ports.

The ship attempted to sail to an Iranian port, in violation of the ongoing blockade. A CENTCOM statement indicated that the military "
item.content:encoded:
India Rescues 24 Crewmembers From Stricken Tanker Off Oman After US Airstrike

Update(1315ET): US Navy forces have announced a new Monday direction action operation in the Gulf of Oman. The US has cited that the vessel refused to respond to orders related to the blockade of Iranian naval ports.

The ship attempted to sail to an Iranian port, in violation of the ongoing blockade. A CENTCOM statement indicated that the military "
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Massachusetts bans sale of precise location data in new privacy rights bill
item.description: Massachusetts bans sale of precise location data in new privacy rights bill
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: UK people: mass surveillance is here. Not maybe, not if XYZ happens, it's here what can we do to actually meaningfully push back
item.description:
They simply cannot be allowed to get away with it, the time to do something about it was years ago - do we have ANY chance to resist ?

I'm not talking about individual actions and using vpns etc I'm talking about actually making sure politicians and companies know that they don't have that right to control human beings they're not special or better than us.
item.content:encoded:
They simply cannot be allowed to get away with it, the time to do something about it was years ago - do we have ANY chance to resist ?

I'm not talking about individual actions and using vpns etc I'm talking about actually making sure politicians and companies know that they don't have that right to control human beings they're not special or better than us.
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Airbnb may have leaked my personal data — scammer called me with my exact booking details posing as an Airbnb case manager
item.description:
I recently received a call from someone claiming to be my senior case manager at Airbnb. What made it convincing was that they had my personal information — details you’d only know if you had access to my Airbnb account or booking data.

My suspicions grew when I noticed the number was private. I called back and someone completely different answered — clearly not the
item.content:encoded:
I recently received a call from someone claiming to be my senior case manager at Airbnb. What made it convincing was that they had my personal information — details you’d only know if you had access to my Airbnb account or booking data.

My suspicions grew when I noticed the number was private. I called back and someone completely different answered — clearly not the
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Looks like privacy form is here to protect Google.
item.description:
Meanwhile I want to say Fuck Google. Considering I can't respond to what Google wants to do to side loading programs.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Saylor's Strategy Buys The Dip As Bitcoin Nears Mining Cost Floor
item.description:
Saylor's Strategy Buys The Dip As Bitcoin Nears Mining Cost Floor

with the SEC on Monday.

Strategy now holds a total of 845,256 BTC - worth around $53.5 billion - bought at an average price of $75,680 per bitcoin for a total cost of around $64 billion, including fees and expenses, according to the company's co-founder and executive chairman,
item.content:encoded:
Saylor's Strategy Buys The Dip As Bitcoin Nears Mining Cost Floor

with the SEC on Monday.

Strategy now holds a total of 845,256 BTC - worth around $53.5 billion - bought at an average price of $75,680 per bitcoin for a total cost of around $64 billion, including fees and expenses, according to the company's co-founder and executive chairman,
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Former Biden J6 Prosecutor's ActBlue-Funded Firm Sues To Stop Trump's UFC White House Event
item.description:
Former Biden J6 Prosecutor's ActBlue-Funded Firm Sues To Stop Trump's UFC White House Event

A federal lawsuit filed over the weekend seeks to halt the UFC "Freedom 250" event scheduled for June 14 on the White House South Lawn. The suit was brought by the Public Integrity Project - which is funded in part by

Brendan Ballou, Capitol rioters. He
item.content:encoded:
Former Biden J6 Prosecutor's ActBlue-Funded Firm Sues To Stop Trump's UFC White House Event

A federal lawsuit filed over the weekend seeks to halt the UFC "Freedom 250" event scheduled for June 14 on the White House South Lawn. The suit was brought by the Public Integrity Project - which is funded in part by

Brendan Ballou, Capitol rioters. He
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Reddit username and posts showing up in Google search despite turning off the options within the privacy tab of my Reddit profile.
item.description:
Please can anyone help and advise on the above issue?

I have turned these options off within my Reddit settings some time ago:

Discoverability

List your profile on old reddit dot com / users List your profile on old reddit dot com / users and allow posts to your profile to appear in r / all

Show up in searc
item.content:encoded:
Please can anyone help and advise on the above issue?

I have turned these options off within my Reddit settings some time ago:

Discoverability

List your profile on old reddit dot com / users List your profile on old reddit dot com / users and allow posts to your profile to appear in r / all

Show up in searc
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Daily Crypto Discussion - June 7, 2026 (GMT+0)
item.description:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Those who rule over you do everything in their power to keep you inside a false reality, where most everything you are taught is a lie.
item.description:
That's the easiest way to control you... keep you away from what's real and what's true.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
That's the easiest way to control you... keep you away from what's real and what's true.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Intel Jumps On Report Google Placed 3 Million TPU Foundry Order
item.description:
Intel Jumps On Report Google Placed 3 Million TPU Foundry Order

After last week's

Google's TPU order with Intel is a big win for the struggling chip foundry as it tries to rebuild its empire in advanced chip production and compete with Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC).
item.content:encoded:
Intel Jumps On Report Google Placed 3 Million TPU Foundry Order

After last week's

Google's TPU order with Intel is a big win for the struggling chip foundry as it tries to rebuild its empire in advanced chip production and compete with Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC).
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Houthis Declare "Total Ban" On Israeli Ships As Dual Chokepoint Crisis Stokes Supply Chain Nightmare
item.description:
Houthis Declare "Total Ban" On Israeli Ships As Dual Chokepoint Crisis Stokes Supply Chain Nightmare

Brent crude futures jumped as much as 5% to $97.83 a barrel, while WTI traded around $95 a barrel, as renewed Iran-Israel fighting First: We declare a complete and total ban on maritime navigation for the Israeli enemy in the Red Sea, and we consider all enemy movements to be military targets for our Armed Forces from the moment this st
item.content:encoded:
Houthis Declare "Total Ban" On Israeli Ships As Dual Chokepoint Crisis Stokes Supply Chain Nightmare

Brent crude futures jumped as much as 5% to $97.83 a barrel, while WTI traded around $95 a barrel, as renewed Iran-Israel fighting First: We declare a complete and total ban on maritime navigation for the Israeli enemy in the Red Sea, and we consider all enemy movements to be military targets for our Armed Forces from the moment this st
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: This Deep-Sea Predator Can Live for Centuries—Now Geneticists Are Close to Hacking the Secrets of Its Longevity
item.description: This Deep-Sea Predator Can Live for Centuries—Now Geneticists Are Close to Hacking the Secrets of Its Longevity
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: NSA was forced to release 334 pages of TOP SECRET UMBRA UAP documents after losing a FOIA appeal. They fought to keep them hidden for 46 years.
item.description:
Not voluntary. The NSA denied the request entirely. It took a legal appeal by the Disclosure Foundation to force the release.

What came out: 1979, Soviet airspace. One night.

10 UFOs at 66,000-85,300 ft

12 UFOs at 10,000-15,000 ft

7 UFOs moving slowly west

13 UFOs at 88,000 ft

MiGs scrambled. Ev
item.content:encoded:
Not voluntary. The NSA denied the request entirely. It took a legal appeal by the Disclosure Foundation to force the release.

What came out: 1979, Soviet airspace. One night.

10 UFOs at 66,000-85,300 ft

12 UFOs at 10,000-15,000 ft

7 UFOs moving slowly west

13 UFOs at 88,000 ft

MiGs scrambled. Ev
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: The Meaning Behind Putin's Response To Zelensky: "Keep On Working, Brothers"
item.description:
The Meaning Behind Putin's Response To Zelensky: "Keep On Working, Brothers"

Zelensky published an open letter to Putin that I, and many others, believe was timed deliberately to coincide with the SPIEF plenary session… This was a provocative move aimed at disrupting the forum's atmosphere. Putin was asked about it during the question and answer period of the final session. He calle
item.content:encoded:
The Meaning Behind Putin's Response To Zelensky: "Keep On Working, Brothers"

Zelensky published an open letter to Putin that I, and many others, believe was timed deliberately to coincide with the SPIEF plenary session… This was a provocative move aimed at disrupting the forum's atmosphere. Putin was asked about it during the question and answer period of the final session. He calle
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: The Silence of the Lambs introduced the world to forensic entomology – but how much has the science changed since?

item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: i got doxxed and leaked lol
item.description: so over like 2-3 months ago i got doxxed on discord and i left everything and even deleted my account. my friend invited me to a server like a week ago and i didnt realize that the people who doxxed me were in there. now they’re fully leaking me in the server when i left maybe a couple days after i realized. i’m kind of having anxiety about it. they sent my family’s info. i
item.content:encoded: so over like 2-3 months ago i got doxxed on discord and i left everything and even deleted my account. my friend invited me to a server like a week ago and i didnt realize that the people who doxxed me were in there. now they’re fully leaking me in the server when i left maybe a couple days after i realized. i’m kind of having anxiety about it. they sent my family’s info. i
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Pentagon Officially Removes 180 Faiths From Military Religion List
item.description:
Pentagon Officially Removes 180 Faiths From Military Religion List

The military had initially listed 211 faith and belief codes, but that number has been sharply reduced under the direction of War Secretary Pete
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Buildings Collapse After 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Philippines; Tsunami Warnings Issued
item.description:
Buildings Collapse After 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Philippines; Tsunami Warnings Issued

A powerful 7.8-magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of Sarangani province in Mindanao early Monday morning, triggering tsunami warnings and causing reported building collapses in the General Santos area.

The quake hit at approxima

Buildings Collapse After 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Philippines; Tsunami Warnings Issued

A powerful 7.8-magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of Sarangani province in Mindanao early Monday morning, triggering tsunami warnings and causing reported building collapses in the General Santos area.

The quake hit at approxima
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Oil Jumps After Israel Strikes Military Targets In Iran, Ignoring Trump Pleas Not To "Strike Back"
item.description:
Oil Jumps After Israel Strikes Military Targets In Iran, Ignoring Trump Pleas Not To "Strike Back"

Summary

  • Despite Trump's pleading to Netanyahu not to respond, Israel launched missiles at Iran striking military targets inside the country.
  • Iran fires missiles on Israel, after IDF unleashed deadly airstrike on Beirut earlier Sunday.
  • Despite Trump saying on Sunday that he would tell Israeli
item.content:encoded:
Oil Jumps After Israel Strikes Military Targets In Iran, Ignoring Trump Pleas Not To "Strike Back"

Summary

  • Despite Trump's pleading to Netanyahu not to respond, Israel launched missiles at Iran striking military targets inside the country.
  • Iran fires missiles on Israel, after IDF unleashed deadly airstrike on Beirut earlier Sunday.
  • Despite Trump saying on Sunday that he would tell Israeli
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Trump Admin Announces $850MM To Modernize US Coal Capacity, Build 2 New Plants
item.description:
Trump Admin Announces $850MM To Modernize US Coal Capacity, Build 2 New Plants

By Robert Walton of

“Last year we prevented 17 GW of coal-powered electricity from going offline. That’s enough power for about 13 million homes, and at a very low price. It’s the lowest price,” Trump said of coal resources.

But critics say the opposite is true. “This move, along with the P
item.content:encoded:
Trump Admin Announces $850MM To Modernize US Coal Capacity, Build 2 New Plants

By Robert Walton of

“Last year we prevented 17 GW of coal-powered electricity from going offline. That’s enough power for about 13 million homes, and at a very low price. It’s the lowest price,” Trump said of coal resources.

But critics say the opposite is true. “This move, along with the P
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Ex-CIA Official Accused Of Inventing Secret Spy Program To Amass $40 Million Gold Hoard
item.description:
Ex-CIA Official Accused Of Inventing Secret Spy Program To Amass $40 Million Gold Hoard

In one of the most insane allegations in recent U.S. intelligence history, a former senior CIA official stands accused of creating an entirely fictitious highly classified program - a "black box" special access program framed as vital continuity-of-government planning - to siphon millions of dollars in government funds for personal enrichment.
item.content:encoded:
Ex-CIA Official Accused Of Inventing Secret Spy Program To Amass $40 Million Gold Hoard

In one of the most insane allegations in recent U.S. intelligence history, a former senior CIA official stands accused of creating an entirely fictitious highly classified program - a "black box" special access program framed as vital continuity-of-government planning - to siphon millions of dollars in government funds for personal enrichment.
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Angry Pentagon Sources Leak Report Of Israel's 'Unhinged' Spying On US Officials
item.description:
Angry Pentagon Sources Leak Report Of Israel's 'Unhinged' Spying On US Officials

It's no secret that Israeli spying and surveillance is pervasive, and it is often even directed at its most powerful ally and backer, the United States. But the phenomenon has escalated of late, outraging Washington intelligence officials.

Behind the scenes of this alliance which mainstream media and pundits typically project as essentially untouchable, deep-seated friction is boiling o
item.content:encoded:
Angry Pentagon Sources Leak Report Of Israel's 'Unhinged' Spying On US Officials

It's no secret that Israeli spying and surveillance is pervasive, and it is often even directed at its most powerful ally and backer, the United States. But the phenomenon has escalated of late, outraging Washington intelligence officials.

Behind the scenes of this alliance which mainstream media and pundits typically project as essentially untouchable, deep-seated friction is boiling o
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Former Musk Adviser Sriram Krishnan Leaving White House AI Role
item.description: Former Musk Adviser Sriram Krishnan Leaving White House AI Role
item.content:encoded: Former Musk Adviser Sriram Krishnan Leaving White House AI Role
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Show HN: Hardbar – compile-time defined i3bar
item.description: A fast, compile-time-configured status bar for i3 and sway, outputting the i3bar JSON protocol. I was worried about the performance of i3blocks due to the constant fork-and-execs, and I thought zig would make it easy to have a bar defined at compile-time. I started on this idea a couple years ago but ended up somewhat stymied by lack of time to chase down some corners of zig syntax interaction. Re
item.content:encoded: A fast, compile-time-configured status bar for i3 and sway, outputting the i3bar JSON protocol. I was worried about the performance of i3blocks due to the constant fork-and-execs, and I thought zig would make it easy to have a bar defined at compile-time. I started on this idea a couple years ago but ended up somewhat stymied by lack of time to chase down some corners of zig syntax interaction. Re
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Bessent Examining Use Of Frozen Iranian Assets To Help Gulf Countries Rebuild
item.description:
Bessent Examining Use Of Frozen Iranian Assets To Help Gulf Countries Rebuild

Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is reportedly pursuing a pathway to repurpose Iranian assets to compensate Amerca's Gulf allies which have suffered significant damage due to Iran's attacks in the wake of Trump's Operation Epic Fury.

Over eighty oil, gas, and vital infrastructure facilities across the Gulf have been hit - with most of the attacks having occurred in March and April - with o
item.content:encoded:
Bessent Examining Use Of Frozen Iranian Assets To Help Gulf Countries Rebuild

Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is reportedly pursuing a pathway to repurpose Iranian assets to compensate Amerca's Gulf allies which have suffered significant damage due to Iran's attacks in the wake of Trump's Operation Epic Fury.

Over eighty oil, gas, and vital infrastructure facilities across the Gulf have been hit - with most of the attacks having occurred in March and April - with o
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Iran Fires Missiles At Israel In First Since April, After IDF Airstrike On Beirut 'Crossed All Red Lines'
item.description:
Iran Fires Missiles At Israel In First Since April, After IDF Airstrike On Beirut 'Crossed All Red Lines'

Summary

  • HUGE ESCALATION: Iran fires missiles on Israel, after IDF unleashed deadly airstrike on Beirut earlier Sunday.
  • Israeli official: "There will be a forceful response."
  • Sunday is day 100 since President Trump launched Operation E
item.content:encoded:
Iran Fires Missiles At Israel In First Since April, After IDF Airstrike On Beirut 'Crossed All Red Lines'

Summary

  • HUGE ESCALATION: Iran fires missiles on Israel, after IDF unleashed deadly airstrike on Beirut earlier Sunday.
  • Israeli official: "There will be a forceful response."
  • Sunday is day 100 since President Trump launched Operation E
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: New York's under-18 social media ban is included in the state budget that was signed by the Governor two weeks ago.
item.description: The New York Children's Online Safety Act has been renamed to the "Safe By Design Act" and merged into Senate Bill 9008, included as a key provision of the state budget, viewable here:
item.content:encoded: The New York Children's Online Safety Act has been renamed to the "Safe By Design Act" and merged into Senate Bill 9008, included as a key provision of the state budget, viewable here:
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Short-Term Bitcoin Holders Are Realizing Their Largest Losses On Record; Most Oversold Since 2018 Collapse
item.description:
Short-Term Bitcoin Holders Are Realizing Their Largest Losses On Record; Most Oversold Since 2018 Collapse

After this week's bloodbath...

Bitcoin is now flashing its most oversold signal since 2018, raising the odds of a relief rebound toward $70,000 in the coming weeks.
item.content:encoded:
Short-Term Bitcoin Holders Are Realizing Their Largest Losses On Record; Most Oversold Since 2018 Collapse

After this week's bloodbath...

Bitcoin is now flashing its most oversold signal since 2018, raising the odds of a relief rebound toward $70,000 in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Europe 2.0, Beyond Brussels: The End Of The European Union As We Know It
item.description:
Europe 2.0, Beyond Brussels: The End Of The European Union As We Know It

Political order does not grow out of procedural routines, commission papers, or moral self-incantation. It grows out of peoples, interests, borders, loyalties, and the willingness to defend what is one’s own. Legitimate authority rests on a people and its consent, not on an apparatus and it
item.content:encoded:
Europe 2.0, Beyond Brussels: The End Of The European Union As We Know It

Political order does not grow out of procedural routines, commission papers, or moral self-incantation. It grows out of peoples, interests, borders, loyalties, and the willingness to defend what is one’s own. Legitimate authority rests on a people and its consent, not on an apparatus and it
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: DentaQuest Data Breach Analysis
item.description: DentaQuest Data Breach Analysis
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves
